fresh_facts.claim: The CIA and U.S. military coordinated a high-risk rescue operation to extract an airman trapped approximately 200 miles inside Iran.
On April 6, 2026, Iran rejected a ceasefire agreement with the United States that would have paused the war and reopened the Strait of Hormuz.
fresh_facts.source: News reports on Iranian government statements

fresh_facts.claim: Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei died in late February from US strikes.
Mojtaba Khamenei was appointed as the new Supreme Leader by the Assembly of Experts following his father's death.
fresh_facts.source: News reports on Iranian government succession

fresh_facts.claim: US President Trump issued ultimatums threatening to destroy Iran's power plants and energy infrastructure if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened, with a deadline tied to Tuesday.
Iran agreed to release 20 cargo ships through the Strait of Hormuz starting Monday in partial compliance with US demands.
A 15-point US peace proposal covering Strait reopening, missile limits, sanctions relief, and nuclear rollback was delivered to Iran via Pakistan.
fresh_facts.source: News reports on US-Iran diplomatic efforts

fresh_facts.claim: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi confirmed review of the US peace plan without intent to negotiate directly.
Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr, a hardliner and ex-IRGC deputy commander, was named as Supreme National Security Council chief, replacing Ali Larijani who was killed in an Israeli strike.
fresh_facts.source: News reports on Iranian government appointments

fresh_facts.claim: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei issued a statement regarding removal of adversaries' security.
fresh_facts.source: News reports on Iranian government statements

fresh_facts.claim: Armed forces spokesperson General Abolfazl Shekarchi warned of attacks on global 'tourist centers'.
The ongoing war has caused enormous collateral damage in Iran, destroying businesses, cultural institutions, and civilian areas, especially in Tehran.
An internet blackout has been implemented across Iran during the conflict.
Public mood in Iran has shifted to exhaustion and questioning of US-Israeli motives, with many viewing the war as aimed at destroying Iran as a nation due to civilian tolls.
Iran's regime repression persists with executions and arrests of dissidents during the war.
fresh_facts.source: News reports on Iranian internal security

fresh_facts.claim: The ongoing war with the US and Israel has boosted loyalist morale among regime supporters rather than sparking mass unrest.
Trump claimed productive phone talks involving envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner with a top Iranian official and postponed US attacks on energy sites for five days.
Iran's parliament speaker denied that negotiations with the United States occurred, though friendly states like Egypt, Pakistan, and Turkey relayed US messages.
Israeli officials accelerated military strikes anticipating the potential end of the war.
fresh_facts.source: News reports on Israeli military operations

fresh_facts.claim: US Republican Rep. Nancy Mace opposed troop deployments in Iran.
fresh_facts.source: News reports on US political responses

regime_fall.current_status: Day 42 escalation intensifies with Israeli strikes on April 7-8 killing IRGC intelligence chief Khademi and targeting petrochemical infrastructure (tens of billions in damage), while Iran launches regional attacks and vows 'Operation Crushing Revenge.' Diplomatic signals remain contradictory with Trump claiming productive talks and a 5-day pause on energy strikes, yet Iran's parliament denies direct negotiations; internally, hardliner consolidation under new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and new SNSC chief Zolghadr continues amid regime repression, while war-boosted loyalist morale coexists with public exhaustion over civilian tolls.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Israeli strikes on April 7-8 killed IRGC intelligence chief Maj. Gen. Majid Khademi and targeted Iran's largest petrochemical facilities in Eslamiyeh and South Pars, causing tens of billions in economic damage while triggering Iranian regional attacks and 'Operation Crushing Revenge' vows.
